title: Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo: Simurian Origin
description: Adds the Simurian Origin to Minecraft. Used with the Sorcery Age mod!
body:
**Requires Ad Astra, Origins, & Sorcery Age 1.20.1 Forge.**


 


This Origin adds in **Simurians** from Jujutsu Kaisen: Modulo. 

Currently, it gives you brand new recipes and allows you to make everything you need to get to **Earth** from the Moon. 

 

It also gives full **vacuum** and **temperature** immunity, but in order to remove the Ad Astra cold overlay, you __must__ remove temperature damage from Ad Astra's config.

It will automatically grant you the **Simurian** trait from __Sorcery Age__, which gives an overlay based on Marulu Val Vol Yelvori's covered eye state, and grants passive **110% Max Cursed Energy Output.** It will also set you to __Sorcerer__.

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1060726415680606218/1431155233081266268/output.jpg?ex=68fc62ad&is=68fb112d&hm=548f5a333ebd96ff7f2f122d54100a8819f60ba07d87019e27ec057b33022be4&)  
  
It will spawn you at a **Moon Tower** and give you some particles as well.

 

I recommend utilizing this with a pack that removes all base origins.

 

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1060726415680606218/1431154950817321060/javaw_qF5b5N0wts.png?ex=68fc6269&is=68fb10e9&hm=71c2277ec97d807d27c579308e33f0a7033a49d1bb0f232d08de0d3399315984&)  
**NOTE:** Obviously this mod is not accurate at all to how Simurians are actually portrayed in the manga. It is mostly just an unserious origin developed so that players could spawn on a different planet and invade Earth, serving as means to start competition/drama between players via races. It is very possible actual integration will be added into the mod itself for this in the future.

 

Developed by AriTepes and TheRealWoodMan.
